title: Hornet Removal in Crown Heights, Brooklyn | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Crown Heights, Brooklyn. Safe elimination of hornet nests from brownstones, apartments & businesses. Licensed experts. Call today!
intro: Crown Heights residents facing hornet infestations need fast, professional removal to protect families and neighbors in this densely populated Brooklyn neighborhood. Our expert hornet removal services safely eliminate nests from brownstones, multi-family buildings, and commercial properties throughout Crown Heights. With pricing from $350 to $550, we provide effective solutions tailored to your property's specific needs.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Crown Heights and understands the unique challenges of hornet removal in Brooklyn's historic brownstones and tight urban spaces. Our licensed technicians use safe, effective methods to protect your family, pets, and the architectural integrity of your property.
localContext: Crown Heights' tree-lined streets, vintage brownstones, and proximity to the Brooklyn Botanic Garden create ideal nesting environments for hornets, especially during warmer months. From Eastern Parkway to the blocks near Prospect Park, we've helped countless residents and businesses in this vibrant neighborhood safely eliminate hornet threats.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Crown Heights?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal services throughout Crown Heights. Given the danger hornets pose, especially in densely populated areas with children and pets, we prioritize emergency calls and can typically arrive within 24 hours of your call.

faqs.question: What factors affect the cost of hornet removal in Crown Heights?
faqs.answer: Pricing between $350-$550 depends on nest size, location accessibility, and nest height. Hornets nesting in brownstone eaves, under porches, or in attics may require specialized equipment. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my brownstone or apartment building?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our technicians are specially trained to work in Crown Heights' historic properties and multi-family buildings. We use targeted treatments that eliminate hornets without damaging wood, brick, or other building materials, and we coordinate with building management when necessary.

faqs.question: How do I know if I have hornets versus wasps or bees in Crown Heights?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than typical wasps, with black and white or black and yellow coloring, and build large, papery gray nests often in elevated locations. If you're unsure, our experts can identify the species during inspection and recommend the appropriate removal strategy for your Crown Heights property.
